name: ServiceNow_Voice_Flow
description: Minimal voice entry flow for the ServiceNow KB + Incident AI Agent. After import, rebind VirtualAgentV2 to the imported ServiceNow KB + Incident AI Agent and replace the demo queue with your target handoff queue.
